title: phyllis viscosa
intro: Phyllis viscosa, also known as sticky Phyllis, is a type of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Phyllis viscosa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
